title: MLG Datapack
body:
Honestly I came up with the idea for this in like 1 minute and the data pack prob isn't that good but anyways, MLG is a data pack that teleports you 200 blocks higher than your current y value every minute, that's it. To install it download the data pack, and then when creating a world click on more, Data Packs, drag the zip file into the window, create the world, and you're done.

Working MC Versions - 1.17, 1.18, 1.19, 1.20

Native MC Version - 1.20

That's all hope you enjoy!
